column1: # This manifest lists the audio files used in Question 1.
# All files are publicly available; no redistribution is included in the repo.
#   id           – short identifier used in the code
#   file         – path relative to data/ (download separately)
#   description  – what the file is used for

column7: Synthesised voiced+unvoiced+silence signal for MFCC and boundary detection demos
Real speech utterance for MFCC extraction and phoneme alignment (speaker 84)
Second utterance for windowing / leakage comparison
Third-party English sentence used for voiced/unvoiced detection validation
Environmental noise clip used as an unvoiced/noise reference in SNR analysis

column1: #   # Copy or symlink the .flac files into data/
#   # The WAV files are in ESC-50/audio/
# Synthesised audio is generated automatically by running any of the scripts
# without --audio argument; the generated file is saved to outputs/synth.wav.
